info.name: DabApp_Trainer_Full_Flow_2026-06-15
info.description:
Complete trainer module flow — DabApp Backend.
Updated: 2026-06-15 — profile photo upload, cert upload, export endpoints, multipart payout proof.

Admin: yucefr@gmail.com / Raifa98@@
Client: raifadev@gmail.com / Raifa98@@

Run order:
1. Auth (login admin, trainer, client)
2. Upload Certificates → get paths
3. Register trainer with those paths + upload profile photo
4. Manage locations & schedule
5. Client books a session
6. Trainer accepts → starts → completes session
7. Admin approves, moderates, manages payouts
8. Admin exports data (CSV / Excel)

item.name: 02. Certificate Upload
item.description: Step 1 of registration: upload PDF / image certificates. Returns paths[] to use in registration body.

formdata.description: Select PDF / JPG / PNG files (max 5 MB each, up to 10 files)

request.description:
Uploads certificate files. Response:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "...",
  "paths": ["trainers/certifications/file.pdf"],
  "urls": ["http://localhost:8000/storage/trainers/certifications/file.pdf"]
}

Copy the paths[] values into certification_files[] in the registration request.
Delete a specific certificate file by its filename (not the full path).

item.name: 03. Trainer Registration & Profile
item.description: Register as a trainer (Step 2 after certificate upload) and manage profile.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Ahmed Al-Rashidi",
  "name_ar": "أحمد الراشدي",
  "bio": "Professional motorcycle riding instructor with 8 years of experience in coaching and competition riding.",
  "bio_ar": "مدرب قيادة دراجات نارية محترف بخبرة 8 سنوات في التدريب والمنافسة.",
  "specialty": "coaching",
  "certifications": "MSF Certified Instructor, UAE Driving License Category B, Advanced Motorcycle Coaching Certificate 2023",
  "certification_files": [
    "trainers/certifications/certificate1.pdf",
    "trainers/certifications/certificate2.jpg"
  ],
  "experience_years": 8,
  "price_per_hour": 150.00
}

request.description:
specialty values: coaching | competition | off-road | street | custom

certifications = plain text string (degrees, credentials).
certification_files = array of path strings returned by the upload endpoint above.

Profile status will be 'pending' until an admin approves it.

formdata.description: Profile / cover photo (JPG, PNG, max 2MB). Leave empty to keep the current photo.

formdata.value: Professional motorcycle trainer specializing in beginner to advanced coaching and competition prep.
مدرب دراجات نارية متخصص من المبتدئين للمتقدمين وتحضير المسابقات.
MSF Certified Instructor, UAE Driving License Category B, Advanced Coaching Certificate 2023
formdata.description: Plain text — list of degrees and credentials
Repeat this key for each file path returned by the Upload Certificates endpoint

request.description:
⚠️ Must use multipart/form-data (not JSON) because of the photo file field.

All text fields are optional — only send what you want to update.
certification_files[] accepts multiple values — add one row per file path.
Send only the photo field — all other fields are optional so nothing else gets overwritten.
day_of_week: 0=Sunday, 1=Monday, 2=Tuesday, 3=Wednesday, 4=Thursday, 5=Friday, 6=Saturday

body.raw:
{
  "booking_date": "2026-06-20",
  "start_time": "09:00",
  "duration_hours": 2,
  "session_type": "beginner",
  "location_id": {{location_id}},
  "notes": "First time on a motorcycle — need basic safety and control training."
}

request.description: session_type: beginner | intermediate | advanced | custom
If the booking was paid, an automatic PayTabs refund is triggered via tran_ref.

item.name: 09. Trainer Sessions
item.description:
Trainer-side session management (uses trainer_token).

Flow: My Sessions → Accept → Start → Complete
       or:   My Sessions → Reject (cancels + refunds client)

request.description:
Trainer accepts a pending booking → status becomes 'confirmed'. Client is notified.

After accept → run 'Start Session' then 'Complete Session'.
Trainer rejects a pending booking → status becomes 'cancelled'. Client is notified with the reason. If booking was paid, automatic PayTabs refund is triggered.
Marks session completed, sends client notification, and creates a payout split record.

item.name: 10. Admin — Trainer Management
item.description: Manage trainer accounts. Routes use auth:api (multiple roles have access, not admin-only).

request.description: Returns a CSV file download of the trainer list. Apply the same filters as the list endpoint. Save response to a .csv file.
Returns an Excel (.xlsx) file download. Save response to a .xlsx file.
Returns trainer profile including certification_files[] with public storage URLs.
Sets trainer status to 'approved'. Sends push notification + email to trainer.
Makes review visible publicly. Notifies trainer.
Confirms booking. Notifies both client and trainer.
Admin cancels booking. Notifies both client and trainer.
Exports filtered booking list to CSV. Save response body as a .csv file.
Exports filtered booking list to Excel (.xlsx). Save response body as a .xlsx file.
Removes trainer override. Trainer falls back to the global commission rate.
Approves payout request. Sends notification to trainer.

item.name: Mark Payout as Paid (+ proof upload)

formdata.description: Screenshot or receipt of the transfer (JPG/PNG/PDF, max 5MB — optional but recommended)

request.description:
⚠️ Must use multipart/form-data (not JSON) because of the proof file field.

transfer_ref is required. transfer_proof (file) is optional but should be uploaded as evidence.
Marks payout as paid, settles the payment split, notifies the trainer.
Exports payout list to CSV. Filter by status (pending/approved/paid/failed), trainer, or date range.

query.description: Filter by year (combine with month for monthly view)
1–12 — leave disabled for full year view
Custom range — overrides year/month if set
